name: In Play Golf
address: 115 Duffner Dr Suite C, Lynden, WA 98264
about: InPlay is an indoor golf facility featuring TrackMan iO simulators and operating 24/7 with keyless entry access. The venue offers hourly play, memberships, and leagues for both individual and group golfers. Located in Lynden, WA, it provides a premium, flexible golf experience with a focus on technology, social competition, and convenience for all skill levels.
why_golfers_like_it: 24/7 keyless entry access provides ultimate flexibility
Premium TrackMan iO technology delivers highly accurate ball and club tracking
Social leagues and tournaments create a fun, competitive environment
Flexible pricing with hourly rates, memberships, and gift card options

food_and_drink.notes: No mention of bar or alcohol service

simulator_hardware.notes: Ceiling-mounted system with radar, infrared, and high-speed imaging

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website doesn't specify, but it's standard practice to bring your own clubs to golf simulator venues.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: There is no mention of outside food or drink policies, but as a BYOB venue, it may be allowed.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website doesn't specify exact timing, but typical simulator rounds take 1-2 hours depending on pace of play.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is family-friendly with mentions of group play and events suitable for different ages.
